meta.title: A Tale Of Two (Very Different) Secure ICS Architectures
meta.description: Alexandrine Torrents, on the S4x22 Main Stage, presents two very different ICS architectures (traditional power plants and distributed energy resources) that can and do exist in a single company.  Alexandrine then looks at the security requirements and architecture for each. They are very different.
